name: img creation prompts
text:
Name = 'Mark Strong' take the {{Name}} image and redraw it to match the EXACT technique of the Gosling reference:

  • face should be mostly WHITE with thin black outlines, not filled with black
  • black ONLY for hair and clothing
  • remove the heavy black shapes on the face (cheeks, around eyes, nose)
  • keep {{Name}} likeness and the same pose match this exact technique: WHITE face, thin black outlines, black ONLY for hair and clothing, PURE WHITE background (not grey), strictly 2 tones — no grey, no third tone, no shading on the face, NOT a silhouette. keep the same person and pose. High-contrast black and white stencil portrait of Mark Strong, bold solid black shapes, smooth flowing vector curves, clean white negative space, no gradients, no grayscale, screen-print style, minimalist, front-facing symmetrical, head and shoulders, stark white background
